race.comment: SLIPSAIN (1) has settled a long way off the speed in his two races this prep before making some inroads late in the piece. Placed in a BM62 over the mile at the Sunshine Coast last prep so a step up from 1350m to 1690m at this stage of the campaign looks ideal. SUMMIT (5) caught the eye over 1350m at this track two runs back then failed to flatter at Doomben last time over the same trip. New to this journey but it looks like the right option. Can bounce back without surprising. AIMA SUN (7) tackled a Class 5 over a similar trip to this at Beaudesert recently and was not up to the task. A dryer track today will help the cause as does a step back in class. Can improve sharply. CLASSIQUE GAL (8) missed out narrowly two back over 1710m at this track then found 1350m too sharp last start. In the right race to return to form. SWITCHBLADE (2) is on trial beyond 1400m but is looking a bit one-paced so it may spark a revival.
